_comment: Precomputed REAL Ensembl data for the bundled demo sample's fixed variants (sample/NSCLC_variants.vcf). Used ONLY as a fallback when the live Ensembl REST API is unreachable, and ONLY for these exact, known inputs — never for arbitrary user variants. Same pattern as the curated docking-receptor cache in gene_index.json: real precomputed data for a fixed demo input so the flagship flow stays deterministic when a third-party API has an outage — not fabrication. 'annotations' is keyed by chrom:pos:ref:alt (chrom without 'chr'); 'protein_sequences' is keyed by transcript_id and holds the exact translated protein Ensembl returns. source is relabeled to '*_cached_sample' at fallback time so a cached answer is never misrepresented as a live call. To regenerate, re-fetch each from a healthy Ensembl and paste the result.
_note_shape: The variant-annotation entries below sit at the top level for backward compatibility; protein_sequences is a nested object.

7:55249071:T:G.note: No protein-coding missense consequence found at this exact position for any transcript (may fall in a pseudogene/lncRNA/intronic region even if the VCF's own INFO=GENE label names a nearby coding gene).
